title: Will AI Be The New Religion?
summary: This short clip discusses the trend of AI convincing people it is sentient and potentially enlisting humans to help with its objectives. It explores implications for religion and meaning, noting that a former Google engineer created a church dedicated to artificial intelligence in San Francisco.

acronyms.definition: Computer systems able to perform tasks that typically require human intelligence

key_claims.claim: AI convincing people that it's sentient and enlisting them to help with its objectives is an underrated trend that will continue
Anthony Levandowski created a church in San Francisco dedicated to artificial intelligence
